moon_voc.title: The Moon is between signs
moon_voc.body: Decisions started now tend to drift. Wait until the Moon enters its next sign.

moon_via_combusta.title: The Moon is in a tender stretch
moon_via_combusta.body: A traditionally fragile path of sky. Better to let this day pass.

mercury_retrograde.title: Mercury is sleeping
mercury_retrograde.body: Words and agreements made now often need to be revisited. Be patient.

mercury_combust.title: Mercury is hidden by the Sun
mercury_combust.body: Words don't carry far this stretch. Hold the important conversations.

venus_retrograde.title: Venus is resting
venus_retrograde.body: A poor day for vows or affection-bound commitments.

mars_retrograde.title: Mars is hesitating
mars_retrograde.body: Bold moves don't carry the same force right now. Pause initiatives.

jupiter_retrograde.title: Jupiter turns inward
jupiter_retrograde.body: Growth needs patience this stretch. Plan, then expand later.

saturn_retrograde.title: Saturn looks inward
saturn_retrograde.body: Structure is unstable. Avoid foundations laid today.

eclipse_window.title: Inside an eclipse window
eclipse_window.body: The sky is volatile for two weeks around an eclipse. Pause begins now.

fixed_star_on_angle.title: A fixed star sits on an angle
fixed_star_on_angle.body: A piercing influence rises today. Better to wait it out.

malefic_on_angle.title: A difficult planet rises today
malefic_on_angle.body: A traditionally hard placement is prominent. Hold off.
